programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly refuses to mention Raquel by name to Eric and Reg is furious as it is his only way of getting to Leo. Mike discovers Jim has disappeared with his car.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Billy and Betty return from their honeymoon, while Jim refuses to beg Mike for his job back.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank pressures Kim for an answer. Zoe and Emma's hen night arrives and Susie has one last attempt at changing Zoe's mind. The Dingles say goodbye to Elvis.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim is reluctant to let Dave announce their engagement around the village. Emma and Zoe make their vows to each other at the blessing. A fight erupts between Emma and Susie.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Christmas arrives in Aidensfield, and Mike and Tricia try to reunite a blind woman with her stolen guide dog. Elsewhere, a young woman at the centre of a political scandal seeks refuge in Aidensfield as she attempts to avoid the paparazzi. Jason Durr and Clare Calbraith star.(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Henpecked George finally finds a job, but the line of work could make him unpopular with road users. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce.(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Mildred faces the prospect of becoming a step-grandmother when George's past catches up with him. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The trio move out to allow workmen into the flat, and Robin is more than happy to share a bed - until he finds out who with. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan.(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle responds to complaints of sabotage at an RAF burns hospital and uncovers adultery and murder within the medical unit. As the hunt for the guilty party intensifies, the detective discovers his son Andrew could be a suspect and is shocked when he hears he has been reported missing from his barracks. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, John Wood, Honeysuckle Weeks and Julian Ovenden.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Blaketon is overjoyed when he discovers a cricketing legend has checked into the pub. David inadvertently prompts a petrol crisis. Nostalgic drama, starring Derek Fowlds, David Lonsdale and Clive Mantle.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris is furious with Zoe for making the Tates a laughing stock. Emma gets drunk in the Woolpack and makes a scene. Zoe goes looking for Susie.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank is convinced that Kim will come running back to him. Mandy comes up with a money-making scheme. Zoe is cornered into making a choice between Susie and Emma.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz urges Jim to apologise to Mike. Vera is daunted by the prospect of being a boss. Fiona realises is Fisher is legit when she discovers he is Raquel's agent.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Duckworths officially take over at the Rovers. Jim finds he isn't entitled to dole money as he was sacked. Fiona decides to have a go at modelling.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp £5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Blaketon is overjoyed when he discovers a cricketing legend has checked into the pub. David inadvertently prompts a petrol crisis. Nostalgic drama, starring Derek Fowlds, David Lonsdale and Clive Mantle.(n)

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The residents celebrate Christmas 1919 with a lavish party, but tensions are rife and Bates's arrest casts a shadow over the festivities. Mary has to consider her future with Sir Richard Carlisle following a disagreement at a shoot and Violet has concerns about Rosamund, whose new suitor - the dashing but raffish Lord Hepworth - is not all he seems. One-off festive special of the hit costume drama, guest starring Nigel Havers and Sharon Small, with Brendan Coyle, Michelle Dockery, Iain Glen, Maggie Smith and Samantha Bond.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Aircraft manufacturer Lord Mayfield hosts a party to trap a woman suspected of being a spy for the Germans. Fearing events might not go according to plan, Lady Mayfield decides to summon the famous Belgian detective to keep an eye on proceedings. Starring David Suchet, with John Stride and Phyllida Law.(n)

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: A look at comedy in 2003, when Tim, Lee and Dawn's love triangle reached a memorable conclusion in The Office and the original run of Cold Feet bowed out with a tragic storyline. It was also the year when members of the public found themselves the unwitting comedy stooges of hidden-camera shows like Trigger Happy TV and Three Non Blondes, Bruce Forsyth made a memorable appearance as guest host of Have I Got News for You and comedy legend Bob Monkhouse performed his last ever stand-up gig to an audience of fellow comics in a small London pub.(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A farmer's murder and the crash landing of an enemy plane lead Foyle to investigate the activities of a group of land girls, and the detective begins to suspect the captured German airmen have something to hide. Stella Gonet and James Wilby guest star in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks.(n)

The body count rises as an apparent victim of spontaneous combustion, a budding photographer and a newly arrived schoolteacher are the next to be roasted alive. Keith Barron guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Julia McKenzie returns as the sleuthing spinster in the first of three murder mysteries. While staying at a hotel in the Caribbean, Miss Marple investigates the death of a fellow guest, refusing to believe he died of a heart attack. With the help of a business tycoon she sets about finding the real cause of the man's demise, and is soon drawn into a web of deceit and dark magic. Adapted by Charlie Higson and co-starring Antony Sher, Robert Webb, Montserrat Lombard, Daniel Rigby, Hermione Norris, MyAnna Buring, Warren Brown and Oliver Ford Davies.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A well-known eccentric contacts the Belgian sleuth when he is haunted by suicidal nightmares. However, he fails to follow Poirot's advice, and is found dead soon afterwards. Drama, starring David Suchet, with Joely Richardson and Mary Tamm.(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Du Plessis is haunted by his belief that Danny murdered their old enemy Christian Peeters, and the friendship between the two men is tested to its limit. Meanwhile, Caroline, Liv and Charlotte return, only to find their new home falling apart and a mysterious illness affecting the vultures and animals on the reserve. African-set wildlife drama, starring Stephen Tompkinson, Deon Stewardson and Hayley Mills.(n)

programme.desc: Text-based information service.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy takes over Robin's poker game when he is rushed into hospital. Unfortunately, she does not fully understand the rules and puts the rent money at risk. Comedy, with Paula Wilcox and Richard O'Sullivan.(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Geoff gains entry to Number 6 to delete the CCTV footage, Roy finds Shona lurking outside the café, and Dev decides to move the twins to Oakhill School.(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alya makes a shocking discovery regarding Geoff, Asha's problems follow her to her new school and Roy invites Shona to move into his flat.(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Geoff is forced to come clean about hiring escorts, Asha finds a renewed confidence and Shona agrees to live with Roy rather than David.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Andrea struggles seeing Jamie and Belle together, but hatches a plan to tear them apart, and uses the quiz night at the Woolpack to make their affair a very public matter. Rhona and Moira clash during a client meeting, while Rishi hides his alarm when he reads what appears to be a love letter from Wendy addressed to him.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jamie is left panicked when Andrea and Millie disappear, while Nate approaches Rhona with a proposition, suggesting they split half the restaurant order with Butlers. Brenda seeks an apology from Amelia for egging her window, but when Amelia maintains her innocence, Kerry tells Brenda to clear off.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jamie panics when Tracy reveals that Andrea left without her purse, cards, money or car. Kerry is pained as she overhears an emotional Amelia confessing to God that she egged Brenda's windows.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is asked to investigate the disappearance of a bank's most valued customer, who had been planning to sell the chairman a map showing where to find a long-lost silver mine. David Suchet stars.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A former bookie falls under suspicion for the murder of a hospital benefactor, who is found dead in his car. As the detectives investigate the case, it becomes clear their prime suspect had a strong motive, believing the victim was responsible for putting his daughter into a coma. Brian Cox guest stars, with John Thaw and Kevin Whately.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A village of Apern Tallow is rocked by a series of ghostly occurrences that begins with the inexplicable slashing of a painting in the local museum. Barnaby investigates, shadowed by Cully's actor boyfriend, who is preparing for a role as a police officer - but the mysterious events take a far darker turn when a man is found dead on the grave of his ancestor. Prunella Scales guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Carry On Follow That Camel (1967)
programme.desc: A disgraced English gentleman joins the Foreign Legion to restore his honour, and proves himself an unlikely hero. Meanwhile, his naive lost love learns he was innocent, and heads to the desert to bring him home. Comedy, starring Phil Silvers, Jim Dale, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Peter Butterworth, Bernard Bresslaw and Joan Sims.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A dentist falls in love with his young assistant. His anxious wife, believing he has made plans to poison her and thereby remove the main obstacle to happiness, calls for Poirot's help. Drama, starring David Suchet.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate the cloistered world of Midsomer Priory when a nun is found strangled. The detectives uncover a complex mystery involving holy orders, teenage romantic liaisons, African art and missing antique silver as the community is forced to open its doors to 21st-century policing. Former EastEnders actor Cliff Parisi (Minty) guest stars alongside Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth helps an old friend find refuge at country house Greenshaw's Folly, but a sinister shadow falls over the strange building's various inhabitants and a murderer strikes. Miss Marple uncovers secrets from the past about Miss Greenshaw as a dangerous storm gathers and the bodies start to pile up. Julia McKenzie heads an all-star cast that includes Jim Moir (better known as Vic Reeves), Kimberley Nixon, Fiona Shaw, Robert Glenister, Julia Sawalha, Judy Parfitt and Matt Willis (formerly of pop group Busted).(n)

programme.title: Deep Water
programme.desc: Lisa tries to make amends for her part in Lucinda's disappearance but is starting to see a different side to Kate and Guy. Her husband Joe tells her that she should focus on her own family, as their daughter Sally has struggles to cope with the recent events. Guy learns that Sally has been keeping information from the investigation and storms round to Lisa's home. Meanwhile, Detective Constable Joanne Aspinall starts to look into the Rivertys' family history, and grows suspicious of Guy. Starring Anna Friel, Sinead Keenan and Rosalind Eleazar.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A homicidal rapist escapes from prison and embarks on a deadly game of cat and mouse with Morse, relying on his mastery of disguise and bizarre occult connections to stay one step ahead of the law. Only the madman's psychiatrist seems able to provide a lead as to his whereabouts - and her life is in mortal danger as a result. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately, Keith Allen, Richard Griffiths and Harriet Walter.(n)

programme.title: The Loch
programme.desc: The search for a serial killer in the area around Loch Ness becomes a matter of life and death for local detective Annie Redford, who is trying to cope with her first murder case. When the body of a local man is found at the foot of Carn Mohr Mountain and an isolated human heart on the loch shore, the town's normality is shattered and the nightmare begins. Thriller, starring Laura Fraser and Siobhan Finneran.(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Danny finds a potential lifeline for the family as he pitches for a grant from a pharmaceutical company looking to fund an environmental project. The money would enable them to buy their former home, but Danny's old boss Ed Lynch turns out to be his rival. Du Plessis is determined to do whatever it takes to prevent the sale of Leopard's Den to Lynch - but his plan has disastrous consequences.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Aircraft manufacturer Lord Mayfield hosts a party to trap a woman suspected of being a spy for the Germans. Fearing events might not go according to plan, Lady Mayfield decides to summon the famous Belgian detective to keep an eye on proceedings. Starring David Suchet, with John Stride and Phyllida Law.(n)

programme.desc: Frank pressures Kim for an answer. Zoe and Emma's hen night arrives and Susie has one last attempt at changing Zoe's mind. The Dingles say goodbye to Elvis.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim is reluctant to let Dave announce their engagement around the village. Emma and Zoe make their vows to each other at the blessing. A fight erupts between Emma and Susie.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Christmas arrives in Aidensfield, and Mike and Tricia try to reunite a blind woman with her stolen guide dog. Elsewhere, a young woman at the centre of a political scandal seeks refuge in Aidensfield as she attempts to avoid the paparazzi. Jason Durr and Clare Calbraith star.(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Henpecked George finally finds a job, but the line of work could make him unpopular with road users. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce.(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Mildred faces the prospect of becoming a step-grandmother when George's past catches up with him. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The trio move out to allow workmen into the flat, and Robin is more than happy to share a bed - until he finds out who with. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan.(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle responds to complaints of sabotage at an RAF burns hospital and uncovers adultery and murder within the medical unit. As the hunt for the guilty party intensifies, the detective discovers his son Andrew could be a suspect and is shocked when he hears he has been reported missing from his barracks. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, John Wood, Honeysuckle Weeks and Julian Ovenden.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Blaketon is overjoyed when he discovers a cricketing legend has checked into the pub. David inadvertently prompts a petrol crisis. Nostalgic drama, starring Derek Fowlds, David Lonsdale and Clive Mantle.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris is furious with Zoe for making the Tates a laughing stock. Emma gets drunk in the Woolpack and makes a scene. Zoe goes looking for Susie.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank is convinced that Kim will come running back to him. Mandy comes up with a money-making scheme. Zoe is cornered into making a choice between Susie and Emma.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz urges Jim to apologise to Mike. Vera is daunted by the prospect of being a boss. Fiona realises is Fisher is legit when she discovers he is Raquel's agent.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Duckworths officially take over at the Rovers. Jim finds he isn't entitled to dole money as he was sacked. Fiona decides to have a go at modelling.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp £5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Blaketon is overjoyed when he discovers a cricketing legend has checked into the pub. David inadvertently prompts a petrol crisis. Nostalgic drama, starring Derek Fowlds, David Lonsdale and Clive Mantle.(n)

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The residents celebrate Christmas 1919 with a lavish party, but tensions are rife and Bates's arrest casts a shadow over the festivities. Mary has to consider her future with Sir Richard Carlisle following a disagreement at a shoot and Violet has concerns about Rosamund, whose new suitor - the dashing but raffish Lord Hepworth - is not all he seems. One-off festive special of the hit costume drama, guest starring Nigel Havers and Sharon Small, with Brendan Coyle, Michelle Dockery, Iain Glen, Maggie Smith and Samantha Bond.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Aircraft manufacturer Lord Mayfield hosts a party to trap a woman suspected of being a spy for the Germans. Starring David Suchet, with John Stride and Phyllida Law.(n)

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: A look at comedy in 2003, when Tim, Lee and Dawn's love triangle reached a memorable conclusion in The Office and the original run of Cold Feet bowed out with a tragic storyline. It was also the year when members of the public found themselves the unwitting comedy stooges of hidden-camera shows like Trigger Happy TV and Three Non Blondes, Bruce Forsyth made a memorable appearance as guest host of Have I Got News for You and comedy legend Bob Monkhouse performed his last ever stand-up gig to an audience of fellow comics in a small London pub.(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A farmer's murder and the crash landing of an enemy plane lead Foyle to investigate the activities of a group of land girls, and the detective begins to suspect the captured German airmen have something to hide. Stella Gonet and James Wilby guest star in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks.(n)

programme.title: Championship League Snooker Live
programme.desc: Coverage of day six from Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes, featuring the Group One round-robin matches involving Stuart Bingham, RIcky Walden, Jordan Brown and Jamie Clarke, and the Group Eight fixtures involving Jimmy Robertson, Ben Woollaston, Liam Highfield and Alex Usrenbacher. The match between Walden and 2015 world champion Bingham will perhaps be the most eagerly anticipated of the day, while Group Eight looks to be wide open with none of the players inside the world's top 20. Jill Douglas presents, with analysis from Alan McManus, Stephen Hendry and Neal Foulds.(n)

programme.title: Championship League Snooker Live
programme.desc: Coverage of day seven from Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes, featuring matches in Group 7 and Group 16. Some of the biggest names in the sport are confirmed, including Judd Trump, Neil Robertson, Mark Allen and Kyren Wilson. On offer is a first prize of £30,000 and a place in this year's Champion of Champions. The competition is broken down into 16 groups of four, and each group will compete on separate days in a best-of-four-frame round-robin tournament, with the winner of each group going through. Jill Douglas presents alongside Alan McManus, Stephen Hendry and Neal Foulds.(n)

programme.title: Waterworld (1995)
programme.desc: In the future, environmental disasters have left the planet flooded. A web-footed mutant mariner helps a woman and an orphan girl search for a mythical haven of dry land, with the help of a map tattooed on the child's back - but in the process has to fend off a villainous crew of nicotine-addicted pirates. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kevin Costner, Dennis Hopper, Jeanne Tripplehorn, Tina Majorino and Rick Aviles.(n)

programme.desc: An armed gang kidnaps a telephone engineer and uses his expertise to remotely trigger break-in alarms in various banks. programme.desc: A nine-year-old girl is shot dead in a feud between rival gangs, and Quincy finds himself caught up in an argument about how to deal with juvenile offenders.(n)

programme.title: Championship League Snooker Live
programme.desc: Coverage of day eight from Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes, featuring matches in Group 6 - involving Ali Carter, Matthew Selt, Sam Craigie and Dominic Dale, and Group 11, which comprises Mark Allen, Martin O'Donnell, Michael White and Nigel Bond. Featuring 64-players in round-robin groups, the new-look Championship League is taking place behind closed doors with strict rules on social distancing, Covid testing and hygiene in place, in line with government guidelines. Marshall Arena has been selected as the venue as it has an on-site accommodation meaning no players, officials or staff will need to leave the venue once they have entered. Jill Douglas presents, with analysis from Alan McManus, Stephen Hendry and Neal Foulds.(n)

programme.title: Giant Lobster Hunters
programme.desc: Newcomer Steve Hursey goes on his first winter run - and there is a lot riding on it. His family's sea-to-plate restaurant is low on lobsters stocks and it is his job to re-fill them. He is fishing around Hunter Island, an area known for giant reds and howling westerly winds, but weather is the least of his worries. The rope line to one of his pots is tangled, and it's threatening to pull deckhand Jamie overboard.(n)

The match between Walden and 2015 world champion Bingham will perhaps be the most eagerly anticipated of the day, while Group Eight looks to be wide open with none of the players inside the world's top 20. Jill Douglas presents, with analysis from Alan McManus, Stephen Hendry and Neal Foulds.(n)

programme.title: Championship League Snooker Live
programme.desc: Coverage of day seven from Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes, featuring matches in Group 7 and Group 16. Some of the biggest names in the sport are confirmed, including Judd Trump, Neil Robertson, Mark Allen and Kyren Wilson. On offer is a first prize of £30,000 and a place in this year's Champion of Champions. The competition is broken down into 16 groups of four, and each group will compete on separate days in a best-of-four-frame round-robin tournament, with the winner of each group going through. Jill Douglas presents alongside Alan McManus, Stephen Hendry and Neal Foulds.(n)

programme.title: Waterworld (1995)
programme.desc: In the future, environmental disasters have left the planet flooded. A web-footed mutant mariner helps a woman and an orphan girl search for a mythical haven of dry land, with the help of a map tattooed on the child's back - but in the process has to fend off a villainous crew of nicotine-addicted pirates. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kevin Costner, Dennis Hopper, Jeanne Tripplehorn, Tina Majorino and Rick Aviles.(n)

programme.title: Championship League Snooker Live
programme.desc: Coverage of day eight from Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes, featuring matches in Group 6 - involving Ali Carter, Matthew Selt, Sam Craigie and Dominic Dale, and Group 11, which comprises Mark Allen, Martin O'Donnell, Michael White and Nigel Bond. Featuring 64-players in round-robin groups, the new-look Championship League is taking place behind closed doors with strict rules on social distancing, Covid testing and hygiene in place, in line with government guidelines. Marshall Arena has been selected as the venue as it has an on-site accommodation meaning no players, officials or staff will need to leave the venue once they have entered. programme.sub-title: Mona Lisa by Leonardo da Vinci
programme.desc: The broadcaster and journalist examines the stories behind famous works of art, beginning by focusing on Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa. He pays a visit to the Louvre, where millions of visitors queue for hours for a fleeting glimpse of the iconic work, and traces the portrait's history, uncovering stories of groundbreaking artistic experimentation and gruesome dissections and one of the most audacious art thefts of the 20th century.(n)

programme.title: Queen Mary: How She Saved the Royals
programme.desc: Documentary about Elizabeth II's grandmother, who as Queen Consort was George V's most trusted adviser and became a symbol of national stability, particularly during the crisis that ensued when her eldest son Edward VIII abdicated. The programme examines her background prior to marriage and her continuing influence on the modern-day House of Windsor, with royal experts and historians revealing how Queen Mary's devotion to her duty and her country always came before her personal emotions.(n)

programme.title: The Story of
programme.desc: The life and times of the artist who has enjoyed more number one hits than any other British solo artist in chart history. Heavily influenced by his hero Elvis Presley in his younger years, Cliff also starred in a string of fun-loving cinema classics such as The Young Ones and Summer Holiday. He has always remained true to his deeply held Christian beliefs, and once memorably entertained the crowds at Wimbledon when rain stopped play. Here, friends, colleagues and journalists discuss his fascinating life, illustrated with performance and interview archive from every period of his career.(n)

programme.title: Greatest Ever Celebrity Wind Ups

programme.title: Inside
programme.sub-title: Aldi: Secrets of the Billion Dollar Discounter
programme.desc: Documentary looking at how the German supermarket has succeeded in the UK, overcoming industry hostility and old-fashioned snobbery to win the public over with its discounted goods. Former staff reveal how Aldi has overcome shoppers' suspicions using a host of clever techniques to cut costs, from multiple barcodes and less time spent at the tills, to their own-brand products - which are intended to look and taste like their big-name counterparts, but cost a fraction of the price.(n)

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House

Meanwhile, Melanie Bosley and her children are left with a disposable income of £137 - less than a tenth of the Lusks' weekly budget. How will they manage when they live each other's lives for a week?(n)

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor recounts the history of Winchester Cathedral, the longest medieval cathedral in northern Europe, which has witnessed civil wars, religious battles and struggled with collapsing foundations. It is the burial place of novelist Jane Austen - though only four people attended her funeral and originally her plaque made no mention of her writing. Tony learns that Winchester's bishops were among the richest, most influential and most badly behaved in the country and some were wealthier and more powerful than even England's kings.(n)

programme.desc: On his way to help DJ and his parents, Ricky gets stuck inside the adventure park Bike Sphere.(n)

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: On Pie Swap Day, Mayor Humdinger sends Rocky Kitty to get one of Mr Porter's so he can take part.(n)

programme.title: Floogals
programme.desc: The aliens slip inside Mum Hooman's bag, thinking that they are accompanying Scruffy the dog on a walk, but they find themselves at the vets.(n)

programme.title: Becca's Bunch
programme.desc: Becca mistakenly think Pops' Super Juice gives its drinker super powers.(n)

programme.title: Little Princess
programme.desc: Princess learns that to earn a medal in the castle, a person has to do something very brave. With the voices of Julian Clary and Jane Horrocks.(n)

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Timmy Turtle, looking for a perfect hiding spot, ends up on Dilly's ship, and discovers that Dilly took Rod's accordion.(n)

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.sub-title: We Are Off to the Beach!
programme.desc: The Bunnies pack for a holiday. There's room for a watering can, a plastic duck, a globe, an anchor and other such essential items, but Hopper's favourite beach ball just won't fit.(n)

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence.(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.sub-title: On Benefits: Life on the Dole
programme.desc: The documentary series focuses on welfare recipients from the Merseyside area, including New Brighton man Jimmy, who struggles to find work as his religious beliefs prevent him from working on a Sunday, and Birkenhead single mum Nicola, who has become an expert bargain hunter to help stretch her benefits. Wallasey man Joe has a number of serious health conditions and hasn't had a shower at home in three years. However, after three years on the waiting list, a move to a specially adapted bungalow is finally on the cards.(n)

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The ladies reminisce about some of their past money-making schemes before Sophia reveals another get-rich quick plan.(n)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose informs the ladies that she is to be a mother again.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin and Leah fall out when they learn of Maggie's infidelity, and Robbo's mother Wendy arrives for Jasmine's ultrasound scan, but her arrival is not the only surprise of the day.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Toadie secures Elly's release from jail, Claudia realises that she has nowhere to run and turns herself in, while Karl seeks comfort elsewhere after fighting with Susan.(n)

programme.title: My Evil Stepdad (2019)
programme.desc: Concerned her widowed mother Tracy will be lonely when she leaves for college, kind-natured Ashley secretly creates an online dating profile for her mum and encounters Jared, who seems like the perfect match. When Tracy 'accidentally' meets Jared and they fall in love, Ashley is comforted to see her mother happy, until Jared moves in and begins doing whatever he can do to shut her out of their new life. It quickly becomes apparent that Jared's hold on Tracy could lead to devastating consequences. Thriller, starring Chris Johnson, Jennifer Lafleur and Addy Stafford.(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Phoebe's Birthday Dinner
programme.desc: The pals eagerly look forward to Phoebe's birthday dinner at a fancy restaurant, but Chandler and Monica have an argument just before setting off. Meanwhile, Ross creates a domestic crisis by locking himself and Rachel out of the flat - with Emma inside. Directed by and starring David Schwimmer, with Jennifer Aniston.(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Male Nanny
programme.desc: Ross mocks Rachel's decision to hire a sensitive male nanny, while Phoebe's love life is complicated by the return of former boyfriend David, who left for a job in Minsk but now wants to rekindle their relationship. Guest starring Freddie Prinze Jr and Hank Azaria.(n)

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Toadie secures Elly's release from jail, Claudia realises that she has nowhere to run and turns herself in, while Karl seeks comfort elsewhere after fighting with Susan.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin and Leah fall out when they learn of Maggie's infidelity, and Robbo's mother Wendy arrives for Jasmine's ultrasound scan, but her arrival is not the only surprise of the day.(n)

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories.(n)

programme.title: Around the World by Train with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor goes on rail journeys around the globe, jumping on and off trains to find adventure and face challenges, while exploring the history and culture of each place he visits.(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: New Zealand's Northern Explorer, the longest-running passenger service in the country. The train travels 423 miles along the historic North Island Main Trunk Line on a 12-hour voyage and the journey takes travellers through some of the most astonishing landscapes of the southern hemisphere from volcanoes to coast and from lava fields to unspoilt islands. Historians explain the history of the railway and tell the tale of the terrible tragedy at Tangiwai, when over 150 people were killed by a volcanic mudflow that hit the train. Narrated by Bill Nighy.(n)

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Bob and BoBo are in pursuit of a clapped-out white van through the back streets, where a dead end brings the vehicle to an abrupt halt and the occupants make off on foot. Martin clocks a driver speeding at more than 100mph, while Kev and rookie Oliver expose a cunning insurance scam.(n)

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A 41-year-old patient is escorted off the premises of Hull Royal Infirmary after verbally abusing a receptionist in the waiting room, but is allowed back into the hospital to have his hand treated after calming down. In resus, Dr Jeremy Osman and a full trauma team attempt to save the life of 18-year-old Jack, who has severe injuries after falling off his scooter at high speed.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic take on an eviction case in Nottingham, where a landlord wants his property back after months of rent arrears and alleged anti-social behaviour - and find themselves confronted by a volatile tenant who insists he has the right to stay and refuses to back down. The duo also chase £5,000 for an unpaid parking fine, which comes as a shock to the debtor, who has clearly hit hard times.(n)

programme.title: Hannibal (2001)
programme.desc: Fugitive serial killer Dr Hannibal Lecter has gone into hiding as an academic in Italy, but a disfigured victim is determined to find him and inflict a gruesome revenge. FBI agent Clarice Starling is once again drawn into the doctor's deadly orbit as she finds herself being used as bait for the avenger's trap. Ridley Scott's thriller sequel, starring Anthony Hopkins, Julianne Moore, Gary Oldman and Ray Liotta.(n)

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip.(n)

programme.title: Anna and the King (1999)
programme.desc: A widowed schoolmistress leaves Victorian England to tutor a son of the King of Siam, only to discover his majesty actually expects her to care for all 58 of his children. In spite of disagreements and many ups and downs, the teacher gradually forms a deep platonic love for her royal employer. Period drama, starring Jodie Foster, Chow Yun-Fat, Ling Bai, Syed Alwi, Tom Felton and Randall Duk Kim.(n)

programme.title: The Longest Day (1962)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama chronicling the planning and execution of the Allied landings in Normandy on June 6, 1944, from the differing perspectives of the British, German, French and American forces. Starring Richard Burton, Richard Todd, Kenneth More, Sean Connery, John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, Henry Fonda, Curt Jurgens, Roddy McDowall and Rod Steiger.(n)

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley.(n)

programme.title: Baywatch (2017)
programme.desc: A veteran lifeguard commands a highly trained team that keeps the sun-kissed resort of Emerald Bay safe. As he breaks in some new recruits - including an insubordinate former Olympic swimmer - he has to contend with a dangerous new drug sweeping the beach. Action comedy based on the TV series, starring Dwayne Johnson, Zac Efron, Alexandra Daddario and Priyanka Chopra.(n)

programme.title: As Above, So Below (2014)
programme.desc: An expedition ventures into a network of underground tunnels beneath Paris. As they explore the catacombs, the archaeologists experience a series of strange events and come under attack from a mysterious unknown force that seems to know their darkest secrets. Horror, starring Perdita Weeks and Ben Feldman.(n)

programme.title: Embrace of the Serpent (2015)
programme.desc: An Amazonian shaman befriends two scientists at different points in his life, each in search of the same rare plant. Drama, starring Nilbio Torres and Antonio Bolivar. In Spanish, Portuguese, Aboriginal, German, Catalan and Latin.(n)

programme.title: Baggage Claim (2013)
programme.desc: An air hostess is horrified at the thought of her younger sister getting married while she is still single. She realises her job gives her access to eligible men from across America, and begins clocking up thousands of air miles as she scours the country for a potential fiance. Romantic comedy, with Paula Patton and Taye Diggs.(n)

programme.title: Rio 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Parrots Jewel and Blu lead a happy life together in Rio with their three chicks, until they find themselves hurled into an expedition up the Amazon. The journey leads to an encounter with an old enemy, while Blu also has to win the approval of Jewel's fearsome father. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jesse Eisenberg, Anne Hathaway and Jamie Foxx.(n)

programme.title: Shrek Forever After (2010)
programme.desc: The grumpy ogre longs for his simple life as a feared monster, so strikes a deal with magical trickster Rumpelstiltskin to get back to the way things were. However, he soon finds there is a catch - he ends up stuck in an alternate world where none of his friends know who he is and where Rumpelstiltskin has become the kingdom's tyrannical ruler. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz.(n)

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan.(n)

programme.title: GI Joe: The Rise of Cobra (2009)
programme.desc: When a powerful experimental weapon is snatched by a mysterious terrorist organisation, two of the soldiers guarding it are recruited into a top-secret military strike force. As they go in search of the stolen technology, they uncover a plot by its creator to take over the world. Action adventure, with Channing Tatum, Sienna Miller and Christopher Eccleston.(n)

programme.title: Stargate (1994)
programme.desc: An Egyptologist and a soldier head an expedition through a mysterious portal to an alien planet. The world they find resembles ancient Egypt and is under the rule of a tyrant who has convinced the downtrodden inhabitants that he is a god - until the humans incite the enslaved populace to fight back. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kurt Russell, James Spader and Jaye Davidson.(n)

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber To (2014)
programme.desc: Dim-witted friends Harry and Lloyd are reunited after 20 years. When Harry discovers he has a daughter he never knew about, he breaks his friend out of a psychiatric hospital and they go on a road trip with the intention of fulfilling parental responsibilities neither of them is capable of. Comedy sequel, starring Jim Carrey and Jeff Daniels.(n)

programme.title: Quadrophenia (1979)
programme.desc: A teenager in 1960s London is unhappy with his lot in life, but believes he has found a place to belong in the mod subculture and their feud with the rival rockers. As the mods gather in Brighton for a weekend that turns to violence, his naive vision of the world is cruelly shattered. Drama based on the Who album, starring Phil Daniels, Leslie Ash, Sting and Ray Winstone.(n)

programme.title: Hondo (1953)
programme.desc: A hard-boiled cavalry scout with a feral dog as companion stumbles across a woman and her child stranded on their homestead deep inside hostile territory. Despite repeated attacks by the Apaches, they refuse to leave their home, leaving the scout with no choice but to stay and defend her. Western, starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond and Michael Pate.(n)

programme.title: Anastasia (1956)
programme.desc: In 1920s Paris, exiled Russians claim they have found the daughter of the last Tsar, who was originally believed to have been killed with the rest of her family. She is taken into the care of a General and groomed until she can convince Anastasia's cousin Prince Paul that she is genuinely the tsarina and inherit a fortune. Historical drama, starring an Oscar-winning Ingrid Bergman, and Yul Brynner.(n)

programme.title: Death Drums Along the River (1963)
programme.desc: A British inspector is called to Africa to investigate the murder of a fellow policeman and uncovers a diamond-smuggling operation seemingly connected to an upriver hospital. Mystery, based on Edgar Wallace's novel Sanders on the River, starring Richard Todd, Marianne Koch, Albert Lieven and Walter Rilla.(n)

programme.title: 49th Parallel (1941)
programme.desc: Six Nazis are left stranded in Canada after their U-boat is sunk. As they try to escape the attentions of the authorities, they struggle to win sympathy among the locals. But when that fails, they decide to flee to the still-neutral USA instead. Michael Powell's Oscar-winning Second World War thriller, starring Anton Walbrook, Leslie Howard, Laurence Olivier, Glynis Johns and Niall MacGinnis.(n)

programme.title: Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer (2007)
programme.desc: The super-powered team takes on a mysterious alien who has been sent by his planet-eating master to prepare Earth for obliteration. While the four heroes try to find a way to foil its plans, an old enemy returns, intent on seizing the extraterrestrial's power. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Michael Chiklis, Chris Evans and Jessica Alba, with the voice of Laurence Fishburne.(n)

programme.title: True Lies (1994)
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary computer salesman leads a double life as a secret agent battling international terrorism. His naive wife is unaware of his dual employment, and goes in search of adventure - only to end up in the clutches of terrorists who have stolen a nuclear weapon. James Cameron's action comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Jamie Lee Curtis and Tom Arnold.(n)

programme.title: Adore (2013)
programme.desc: Two women who have been friends all their lives live in a quiet stretch of the Australian coast. They find unexpected happiness after each has an affair with the other's teenage son, but their unusual relationships are threatened when the outside world intrudes on their isolation. Drama based on Doris Lessing's novel The Grandmothers, with Naomi Watts and Robin Wright.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff grows jealous of Audrey's sexy home Pilates instructor and decides to fire him. Timmy and Russell fight for the attention of a good-looking waitress, and Jennifer is embarrassed when she learns about Adam's cheerleading past.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey tries to forge a deeper connection with Brenda, who agreed to be her surrogate, by arranging for her and Jeff to go on a double date with the woman and her girlfriend Becky. However, a big secret threatens to ruin the evening. Russell regrets taking his latest date to a magic show, and Adam tries to demonstrate his DIY prowess. Guest starring magician Criss Angel.(n)

programme.title: The House of Magic (2013)
programme.desc: A stray cat wanders into a magician's mansion, and finds it is full of strange gadgets. The illusionist allows him to stay, to the annoyance of his other pets, but the cat proves an invaluable addition to the group when their owner's scheming nephew plots to take the house for himself. Animated adventure, with the voices of Murray Blue and Doug Stone.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Yorkshire groom Lee is tasked with planning a surprise wedding for bride-to-be Rebecca, but instead, goes on a week-long trip around Europe with his brother Lee and his friends.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan loves music as well as his home town of Stoke-on-Trent. So, when bride-to-be Beccie gives him free rein to plan their wedding, he decides to honour them - and not her - with nuptials based on the rare grooves of Northern Soul. Will this groom be able to deliver a swinging day, or will his bride be swinging wildly at him?(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Detective Jake Peralta and his eclectic group of colleagues at Brooklyn's 99th Precinct are used to having a commanding officer who doesn't make them work too hard or follow the rules too closely. That all changes when tightly wound Captain Ray Holt takes over, determined to make the dysfunctional squad into the best in the borough. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is assigned to a minor graffiti case by Captain Holt as punishment for turning up late for work, but the investigation becomes a major headache when the vandal's identity is revealed. Meanwhile, Gina's psychic friend Carlene visits the precinct to help with a case, and upsets Charles with a prediction about his romantic life. American comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For the first time in his career, Jake has a growing number of cases he just can't seem to solve, and the other detectives worry his run of bad luck will rub off on them. Holt asks Amy to take charge of a community outreach programme for at-risk youths, and Boyle helps Jeffords with a tough personal assignment. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake meets an attractive medical examiner at a crime scene, but annoys his colleagues when his attempts to get together with her cause a hold-up with an autopsy report. Meanwhile, Amy discovers Jeffords has some hidden talents when the police sketch artist goes off sick.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cops of the 99th Precinct become the latest victim of the Vulture, a detective from Major Crimes with a habit of taking over investigations just as they are about to be solved. However, Jake is determined not to let the hotshot steal his thunder and races to close his case first. Meanwhile, Holt and Gina help Terry regain his right to carry a gun.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Financial Secret and Fish Sauce
programme.desc: When Sheldon's father asks him to keep a secret from Mary, the stress of not being honest drives him to Tam's for his first sleepover. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Research Study and Czechoslovakian Wedding Pastries
programme.desc: Dr Sturgis recommends Sheldon and Missy for a university research study on twins. but Mary is unhappy when the test results go to Sheldon's head. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian. As her obsession intensifies, she begins to neglect her friends and seeks the company of the usually snide Sheldon, whom she continually pesters for advice. Starring Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Elated at being named one of People magazine's '30 to Watch Under 30', Raj makes a pass at Penny and becomes very arrogant, making it hard for Leonard to maintain a positive perspective on his friend's new-found confidence. Guest starring Charlie Sheen.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. Desperate to be free of the obligation, Leonard and the gang intervene to discover why their friend never learnt to drive. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki, with Octavia Spencer.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is flattered when a graduate student takes a shine to him, but she thinks his social life is distracting him from his work and removes him from his limited circle of friends by forcing him to work on a troublesome scientific problem. Guest starring Riki Lindhome.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's TV breaks down, so she heads to the boys' flat to watch her favourite shows. However, Sheldon tires of her presence and bans future visits, leading to an embarrassing form of retaliation. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj search for the America's Next Top Model house.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard becomes convinced he has met his soulmate in the form of surgeon Stephanie Barnett, but he fails to realise she is far more interested in Leonard. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj argue about what to watch on TV. Sara Rue guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard meets up with the woman he kissed during his trip in the hope of setting Penny's mind at ease, while Sheldon films a special episode of Fun with Flags after his break-up with Amy. Bernadette feels guilty about keeping a secret from Penny.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys' science skills are put to the test when they get a flat tyre during Leonard's surprise bachelor party weekend in Mexico. Meanwhile, the girls finally force Penny to break the news to her family that she has eloped with Leonard. Keith Carradine guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Leonard announce that they are moving in together, prompting Sheldon to revisit 2003, a much simpler time before he had met either of them. Howard and Raj form a band to play at the comic-book store, only to fall out over musical differences.(n)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol (2011)
programme.desc: Secret agent Ethan Hunt and his team are implicated in a bombing at the Kremlin, forcing the American president to declare them fugitives. The spies plan to clear their name by abducting the real terrorist, which leads them into a pursuit around the globe. However, Hunt cannot be sure his colleagues are trustworthy. Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox USA
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces in the US critique the week's TV, including Sharon and Kelly Osbourne, Tyra Banks and Meghan Trainor.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional views of TV from September 2016, including Victoria, The Great British Bake Off, Hunted, Penelope Keith's Hidden Villages, Body Fixers and the News.(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Liverpool lass Alex sits down for a meal with union rep Sam, and they immediately click over their political beliefs - but she isn't too sure when he reveals his musical preferences. Three-times divorcee Zina meets undertaker to the stars Chris, whose job has so far been the kiss of death. Can he convince her he is a catch? DJ Charli sets Scott her usual test for any potential partner - seeing how he reacts to her friend Pascal, who she always carries round with her - and 33-year-old mummy's boy Frank hopes confident gym beauty Nisha will see through his shyness.(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons including Mayfair-based jewellery designer Miki, hapless city worker Arnie, IT worker and self-confessed nerd Sam, Game of Thrones fan Livvy, and fortysomething divorcee Louise meet up, hoping to find love at the most romantic time of the year. This instalment of the dating show also sees the return of mummy's boy Frank, who is determined to put his best foot forward on his date with half-Iranian nurse Catherine who wants to find someone to cuddle in with on a Saturday night while watching Titanic.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Yorkshire groom Lee is tasked with planning a surprise wedding for bride-to-be Rebecca, but instead, goes on a week-long trip around Europe with his brother Lee and his friends.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan loves music as well as his home town of Stoke-on-Trent. So, when bride-to-be Beccie gives him free rein to plan their wedding, he decides to honour them - and not her - with nuptials based on the rare grooves of Northern Soul. Will this groom be able to deliver a swinging day, or will his bride be swinging wildly at him?(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makis's reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Gavin attempts to pull off a Thai-themed wedding in Somerset, while his fiancee Sophie dreams of a rustic, romantic affair.(n)

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Made in Chelsea stars Miles Nazaire, Emily Blackwell and Harvey Armstrong relive a racy summer in Ibiza, when Emily was dating Harry Baron and Sam and Tiff were 'on a break''.(n)

programme.title: Hulk (2003)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Bruce Banner turns into the rampaging green Hulk after exposure to a huge dose of gamma radiation, prompting the military to embark on a no-holds-barred mission to destroy the monster. Meanwhile, Banner's unstable father resurfaces, holding the secret to his transformation. Comic-book adventure from director Ang Lee, starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott and Nick Nolte.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Mozz from Bury hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in and around Manchester, treating his guests to garlic stilton mushrooms and poached pears.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, voiceover artist and film extra Matt cooks up a Jewish Friday night supper, including his mum's traditional chicken soup.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Budding author and mum-of-five Cleona is next to host in Manchester, hoping a menu based on her Jamaican roots will get her guests onside.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Australian radio content director James hosts the fourth party in Manchester, hoping his menu containing Chinese cuisine and his mum's cake recipe can land him the top spot.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Events boss Sharon hosts the final night in Manchester. With her hearty decadent menu on offer, she has to win over Cleona after a bust up on from Cleona's turn as host. Sharon's skills and decorum are put to the test, though Mozz, Matt and James are on hand for moral support.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Desperate circumstances call for desperate measures as Peralta, Captain Holt, Santiago, Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle are forced to ally themselves with some old enemies.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt asks for Jake's help in a case that is exceptionally meaningful to him. Charles and Terry work together on a side business.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is delighted that Leonard has finally managed to find a girlfriend who meets his high standards, but his over-exuberance looks set to cause problems. Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill).(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and the gang are excited when Barry Kripke challenges them to a robot duel. Meanwhile, Howard is devastated when Penny finally tells him what she thinks of his chauvinism. Guest starring John Ross Bowie.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to put his formidable brain power to use in devising a scientific procedure for making friends. However, to prove his findings he must first win the trust of fellow scientist Barry Kripke to gain access to a powerful computer. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and John Ross Bowie.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny runs into money troubles, so Sheldon offers to lend her some cash to help her pay the rent. However, when Leonard discovers his neighbour's ex-boyfriend Kurt is the cause of her financial woes, he gathers the gang for a confrontation. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tries to get Sheldon into the Christmas mood by playing a game, but things do not go as planned when Sheldon reveals a childhood trauma. Raj goes out with the girls and reveals he had crushes on both Penny and Bernadette - but not Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is not pleased when his assistant Alex starts flirting with Leonard and has a word with her about it. Unfortunately, his comments are so inappropriate that he is accused of sexual harassment and sent to the university's human resources department, where he ends up dragging Leonard, Raj and Howard into trouble too. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: As Kate is pulled between two sisters, Luke and Mary are tasked with finding the cause behind Beth's debilitating headaches, while a visitor delivers some good news to Jacob.(n)

programme.title: Misfits
programme.desc: When local teenagers stop getting drunk, taking drugs and having sex, the friends realise something strange is happening. After investigating a mysterious organisation called Virtue, it soon emerges the outfit is not as pure as it may seem, leaving Nathan to save the day. Comedy drama, starring Lauren Socha, Nathan Stewart-Jarrett, Iwan Rheon, Antonia Thomas and Robert Sheehan.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson guides contestants through the game of choosing a partner naked, as they must whittle six contenders down to one with whom to share a date. Here, sick of the party lifestyle, 27-year-old former club rep Chris, from London, hopes to meet someone to settle down with. Next up is 27-year-old technophobe Louise, from Buckinghamshire, who hasn't so far embraced the modern way of dating. A fan of classic romantic novels, Louise is looking for an old fashioned gentleman to sweep her off her feet.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson guides contestants through the game of choosing a partner naked, as they must whittle six contenders down to one with whom to share a date. This edition features Ryan, from Hull. Born with cystic fibrosis, the 24-year-old martial arts instructor is hoping to meet someone who shares his desire to live life to the max.(n)

programme.title: Supernatural
programme.desc: Dean spends some bonding time with Mary and Donna, Nick finally finds the answer he has been searching for and Sam is left to make an unimaginable choice.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny share an intimate moment as they recover from a psychological deconstruction by the physicist's mother, an expert in psychiatry and neural sciences. Guest starring Mamma Mia! actress Christine Baranski.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions between Sheldon and Penny reach a new high after a paintballing accident leaves an ugly stain on the awkward physicist's favourite sofa cushion. Meanwhile, romance blossoms between Leslie and Howard. Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star.(n)

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: As Kate is pulled between two sisters, Luke and Mary are tasked with finding the cause behind Beth's debilitating headaches, while a visitor delivers some good news to Jacob.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Gavin attempts to pull off a Thai-themed wedding in Somerset, while his fiancee Sophie dreams of a rustic, romantic affair.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)
